name: Chocolate Frosting- Sugar Free
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together skim milk, vanilla, and Dream Whip (sugar-free whipped topping mix).
2. Beat until stiff.
3. Add sugar-free chocolate pudding and continue to beat until light and fluffy.
4. If the mixture is too thick, add more skim milk.
5. Use as frosting on low-fat cupcakes using 1 tablespoon per cupcake.
6. Can also be used to frost cake or brownies.
7. Contains 1 tablespoon (TU) of calories and 0 cholesterol.
